raw.title: Amazon Essentials Boys and Toddlers' Pull-On Jean Joggers Pants
raw.description: These pants for toddler boys are crafted from super stretch denim that retains its shape, providing all-day comfort as your little ones explore the world. The jeans for toddler boys' feature a pull-on design with an elasticated back waist for easy dressing, making them a versatile addition to your toddler boy clothes. Outfit your active child in these toddler joggers, which combine the classic five-pocket styling of jeans with the relaxed fit of joggers. They are a great choice for boys clothes and are available in multiple sizes, ideal for your growing boy's wardrobe. The elasticated cuffs give these toddler jeans a modern jogger silhouette, great for everyday wear.

raw.title: Amazon Essentials Sterling Silver Italian 1.4 mm Singapore-Chain Necklace, (previously Amazon Collection)
raw.description: Add glamorous sparkle to your neckline with the Sterling Silver Italian Singapore Chain Necklace. The unique twisting shape that this chain-style possesses creates a delicate yet flavorful look. Some of the design and fine-craftsmanship practices seen in this Singapore Chain are inspired by Egyptian, Greek, and Asian culture, discovered centuries ago during the Etruscan period in Southern Italy. The wonderful quality and sophistication of this Italian-made chain is superior. Wear the chain with a jewel-encrusted pendant for an elegant look or solo to represent your dainty style. Comes in a variety of chain lengths and thicknesses.

raw.title: Smitten Women's Soft 4-Way Stretch Wrinkle Resistant Cargo Scrub Pant, Navy, Large
raw.description: We design quality medical scrubs and uniforms with universal appeal. Slip on this pair of breathable fabric scrub pants to discover your perfect fit. Added room along the hips and thighs allows for free-and-easy movement, while adding all-day wearability. The durable fabric material withstands repeated washings and long work weeks. Whether it’s Landau scrubs for men or women, we’re known for producing scrubs that work as hard as you do!
bullet_points: 4-WAY SUPER STRETCH FABRIC: Lightweight, moisture-wicking fabric is flexible and wrinkle-resistant for maximum comfort, durability, and shape retention
CONTEMPORARY SLIM FIT: Contoured to conform to your body and complement your shape
FUNCTIONAL STORAGE: 2 welt cargo pockets to keep medical instruments neatly organized and within easy reach
SMITTEN STYLE: Set yourself apart while sporting these fashion-forward scrub pants designed to leave you utterly smitten thanks to a contemporary fit and comfortable construction

raw.title: Amazon Essentials Men's Relaxed Fit Cargo Fleece Jogger Sweatpants with Drawstring
raw.description: These men's cargo sweatpants feature a relaxed fit through the hip, thigh, and leg, sitting comfortably at the waist. Made from cozy, midweight brushed fleece in a cotton-polyester blend, they're perfect for all-day wear. The classic jogger silhouette has a tapered leg and ribbed cuffs for effortless style, while two cargo pockets with hook-and-loop closures offer practical storage for essentials. An elastic waistband with a drawcord ensures a secure, adjustable fit, making these joggers versatile for both casual and athletic activities. Discover consistent sizing and lasting quality with these must-have men's cargo sweatpants. Amazon Essentials is focused on creating affordable, high-quality, and long-lasting everyday clothing you can rely on. Our line of men's must-haves includes polo shirts, chino pants, classic-fit shorts, casual button-downs, and crew-neck tees. Our consistent sizing takes the guesswork out of shopping, and each piece is put to the test to maintain the highest standards in quality and comfort.

Great as gym pants for men or men's workout pants, they're an excellent choice to meet your casual and sport needs.

raw.title: Amazon Essentials Women's Mid Rise Curvy Skinny Jeans
raw.description: An Amazon brand - This skinny jean features classic five-pocket styling and a bit of stretch for added comfort Amazon Essentials is focused on creating affordable, high-quality, and long-lasting everyday clothing you can rely on. Our line of women's apparel includes cashmere sweaters, fleece and down jackets, and more, including plus-size options. Our consistent sizing takes the guesswork out of shopping, and each piece is put to the test to maintain the highest standards in quality and comfort.
bullet_points: CURVY SKINNY FIT: Curvier through the hip with a narrower waist. Snug fit through hip, thigh, and leg.
HIGH STRETCH DENIM: Cut from cotton-blend denim with added stretch for all-day comfort and better fit.
ESSENTIAL SKINNY JEAN: These mid-rise skinny jeans will be your go-to wardrobe essential. The slim and flattering silhouette allows for endless styling options.

DETAILS: Authentic five-pocket styling, zip fly, shank button closure and skinny leg. Available in short, regular, and tall inseam lengths. All denim is unique and will vary in color due to wash, finish, and dye.
INSEAM: Offered in 3 lengths - Short 27", Regular 29", & Long 31" each with a 5" leg opening on US size 6.

raw.title: Amazon Essentials Women's Mid Rise Curvy Skinny Jeans
raw.description: An Amazon brand - This skinny jean features classic five-pocket styling and a bit of stretch for added comfort Amazon Essentials is focused on creating affordable, high-quality, and long-lasting everyday clothing you can rely on. Our line of women's apparel includes cashmere sweaters, fleece and down jackets, and more, including plus-size options. Our consistent sizing takes the guesswork out of shopping, and each piece is put to the test to maintain the highest standards in quality and comfort.
bullet_points: CURVY SKINNY FIT: Curvier through the hip with a narrower waist. Snug fit through hip, thigh, and leg.
HIGH STRETCH DENIM: Cut from cotton-blend denim with added stretch for all-day comfort and better fit.
ESSENTIAL SKINNY JEAN: These mid-rise skinny jeans will be your go-to wardrobe essential. The slim and flattering silhouette allows for endless styling options.

DETAILS: Authentic five-pocket styling, zip fly, shank button closure and skinny leg. Available in short, regular, and tall inseam lengths. All denim is unique and will vary in color due to wash, finish, and dye.
INSEAM: Offered in 3 lengths - Short 27", Regular 29", & Long 31" each with a 5" leg opening on US size 6.
